code:
%% AutoApply v0.9 - Preview & Approve Flow %% User workflow for reviewing and approving generated bullets stateDiagram-v2 [HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> PipelineRunning: User submits JD + Profile PipelineRunning --> ResultsGenerated: Pipeline completes
(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) ResultsGenerated --> ReviewingProposed: Load proposed bullets
(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) ResultsGenerated --> ReviewingSuggested: Load suggested edits
(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) ReviewingProposed --> ViewProvenance: User clicks
"View Evidence" ViewProvenance --> ReviewingProposed: Close provenance card ReviewingProposed --> AcceptBullet: User clicks
"Accept" AcceptBullet --> Accepted: Bullet added
to resume ReviewingProposed --> RejectBullet: User clicks
"Reject" RejectBullet --> Rejected: Bullet discarded ReviewingSuggested --> EditBullet: User clicks
"Edit & Approve" EditBullet --> ManualEdit: User modifies text ManualEdit --> ManualApproved: User confirms ManualApproved --> Accepted ReviewingSuggested --> RejectSuggested: User clicks
"Reject" RejectSuggested --> Rejected Accepted --> ResumePreviewing: Update live preview ResumePreviewing --> ExportReady: All bullets reviewed ExportReady --> ExportPDF: User exports
to PDF ExportReady --> ExportDOCX: User exports
to DOCX ExportReady --> ExportHTML: User exports
to HTML ExportPDF --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]: Download complete ExportDOCX --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]: Download complete ExportHTML --> [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]: Download complete Rejected --> CheckMoreBullets: Discard bullet CheckMoreBullets --> ReviewingProposed: More to review CheckMoreBullets --> ReviewingSuggested: More to review CheckMoreBullets --> ResumePreviewing: All reviewed note right of ViewProvenance Provenance Card Shows: - Evidence sources (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) - Similarity scores - Job requirement matched - AMOT component verification - Full audit trail end note note right of AcceptBullet Proposed bullets are safe to accept - already verified ≥75% by the system end note note right of EditBullet Suggested edits need review because <75% verified. User can edit and approve with full transparency. end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个AutoApply系统的预览和审批流程。用户提交JD和个人简历后，系统通过HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine生成推荐要点，然后进入人工审核环节。
明白了。那审核环节要分成两类吗？我看到有Proposed bullets和Suggested edits两种，它们的来源和可信度是不是不一样？
对，Proposed是从HIPAA Vault加载的，系统已经验证过≥75%，可以直接Accept或Reject。Suggested edits来自LabAnalyzer，可信度较低，需要用户Edit & Approve。
好的，我把两条分支画出来了。另外我加了一个ViewProvenance状态，用户点击"查看证据"可以看到AMOT组件验证和审计追踪，关闭后回到审核状态。
还需要处理拒绝后的流转。如果用户Reject了bullet，应该进入CheckMoreBullets判断还有没有待审核内容，有就回到Proposed或Suggested，没有就进入ResumePreviewing。
CheckMoreBullets的逻辑我理清了。那全部审核完成后进入ExportReady，支持PDF、DOCX、HTML三种导出格式对吧？
是的，但要注意导出后的终点不同：PDF回到PatientRecords，DOCX同步到EMR_Sync，HTML回到DiagnosticEngine做后续分析。
已调整三条导出路径的终点。另外我在ViewProvenance、AcceptBullet和EditBullet旁边加了注释，说明证据来源、可信度阈值和透明度要求。
